sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76023" key="ou)=ros4" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οὖρος</orth> (D), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, βοῦς οὖρος</foreign>, Lat. <sense id="n76023.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">urus, Bos primigenius,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.332</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hadr.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
